reference: Case, K.M. & Parkinson, W.C., J. Fluid Mech. 2, 172 (1957); Miles, J.W., J. Fluid Mech. 30, 163 (1967)
term_tested: bottom Stokes boundary-layer damping in c003 gamma_k
regime_note: BL term matters only for kh <~ 1 (shallow / low-frequency); collapses vs bulk 2*nu*k^2 for kh>>1, consistent with c003 measured band_ms2 collapse above ~57 Hz
detail: c003 bottom-BL term = k*sqrt(nu*omega/2)/sinh(2kh), coefficient 1 (no fudge); matches canonical form; BL matters only kh<~1
ledger: c003 bottom-boundary-layer coefficient YELLOW -> GREEN (canonical form, no fudge factor)
